## Description
Briefly describe what this PR changes.

## Related User Story / Issue
Link the issue or user story this PR addresses.

Example:
Fixes #12

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Backend / API change
- [ ] UI change
- [ ] Database change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] GitHub Actions / CI tests passed
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Not tested locally

### Test Notes
Explain briefly how you verified the change.

## UI Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI updated (add screenshots if needed)

## Screenshots (if UI changed)

| Before | After |
| :--- | :--- |
| Image | Image |

## Notes for Reviewers
Anything reviewers should know before reviewing.

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to a user story or issue
- [ ] Code builds / tests pass in CI
- [ ] Ready for review
